chapter_title.en: Chapter on Judgment Regarding the Flood of the Mahzur Valley

text: 3411 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : "لِلزَّرْعِ إِلَى اَلشِّرَاكَيْنِ وَ لِلنَّخْلِ إِلَى اَلسَّاقَيْنِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3411 - In another narration: "For crops, the water should reach up to the two sandal straps, and for palm trees, up to the two shins."
